title: hydrocotyle umbellata var. bonariensis
intro: Hydrocotyle umbellata var. bonariensis, also known as Pennywort or Gotu Kola, is a type of aquatic plant native to tropical and subtropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Hydrocotyle umbellata var. bonariensis include improving cognitive function, reducing stress and anxiety, and supporting skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, capsules, and tinctures, and it is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
